text:
Owner-curated Tethered Together resource
The supplied directory recommends Tethered Together as a United States rope convention resource: https://tetheredtogether.net/.
The inspected site describes a rope-bondage-focused event with additional programming in circus arts, kink, relationships, dance, and yoga, plus educational workshops, attendee-led programming, art installations, entertainment, and a sex-positive dungeon on Friday through Sunday nights. Its Ropenspace uses a facilitated, self-organizing Open Space process in which participants propose questions or interests and move among evolving classes, discussions, and hands-on skill shares.
title: Owner-curated Tethered Together resource
